title: Doff Growmore 7.7.7 Complete Plant Food– 2Kg Fast-Acting Garden Fertiliser for Healthy Growth of Flowers, Vegetables & Fruits – Nutrient Enriched – Encourages Root Development – Ready to Use
features: VERSATILE PLANT FOOD – Boost the growth of flowers, crops and vegetables with Doff Growmore Complete Plant Food. Enriched with NPK 7-7-7 and micro-nutrients, this fast-acting plant fertiliser promotes healthier, stronger plants and heavy cropping in outdoor gardens and indoor plants

BOOST GROWTH & RESILIENCE – Rich in nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, this balanced plant feed strengthens roots, stimulates flowering, and improves overall plant health. With slow-release nitrogen, simply scatter the fertiliser granules around the plant and water for steady growth

EASY-TO-USE FORMULA – This all-purpose dry plant fertiliser is conveniently supplied as a ready-to-use blend for quick application. Use as a top or base dressing around crops, shrubs, fruit, or lawns, Doff’s fertiliser saves time and effort, offering professional results with minimal fuss

RELIABLE & EFFECTIVE RESULTS – This high-quality flower feed provides consistent, balanced nutrition for a thriving garden year-round. Ideal for indoor and outdoor plants, a 2kg container of nutrient-rich feed supports healthy, flourishing growth in plants large and small

NOURISHING PLANT FEED – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted feeds and straight solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering effective and complete nutritional plant food to help your garden grow
